description_long: This is a low-profile, rectangular wooden cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front face features a series of horizontal slats, likely concealing storage compartments or shelves behind them, and a smooth, unbroken surface on the left side. The top surface is flat and expansive, suitable for placing decorative items or electronic devices. The cabinet is constructed from a rich, medium-brown wood with a natural grain pattern visible across all surfaces. The sides are plain, with the slatted detail only present on the front, and the back is not visible. The overall appearance suggests it is designed for use as a media console or storage unit in urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A modern, low-profile wooden cabinet with horizontal slats on the front and a smooth, flat top. Its rich brown wood finish and minimalist design make it suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal slatted design across most of the face, with a smooth section on the left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and the continuation of the wood grain, with the slats just visible at the front edge.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the flat, expansive surface and the arrangement of the slats and smooth sections below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and plain side panel.
